author: assistant
reason: COMP-0026 records independent provider agreement that exact production inventories, quantities, and historical assertions are incorrectly acting as static schema. The missing parametric registry, referential-integrity checks, fixture-based lifecycle tests, and projection-drift enforcement constitute a distinct architectural self-model gap. This warrant supports registering GAP-0003 only; it does not admit an implementation plan.
scope: Support registration of GAP-0003 as an open prerequisite for future self-model work. Existing JSON records remain canonical. No registry, test refactor, CLI, schema change, ID allocator, graph integration, or CAP-0009 exposure implementation is admitted by this warrant.
